item.title: Modernist Imagery
item.description:
﻿This is a sample scholarly paper about the role of imagery in modernist poetry.
Modernist poets like T.S. Eliot and Ezra Pound revolutionised the use of imagery in poetry. Unlike their Romantic pred...
